violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Knives were observed being stored in between the prep unit and prep table. Knives were cleaned at the time of inspection. Knives must be stored on a clean surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The 2-door lowboy gasket was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The 2-door lowboy slider was observed holding an ambient temperature of 50 DF and in poor repair. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the knife rack and container lid have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The floor tiles in the kitchen by the refrigerators is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by brooms and a container of spices. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 02/06/2024
The floor in the kitchen area had tiles in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2024
